notes: Augment Summoning does work on creatures summoned by this wand.When cast, it summons one creature at random from this list:Celestial Dog: CR 1; Lawful Good; like the Summon Monster I spell.Fiendish Monstrous Scorpion: CR 2; immune to poison, melee, can poison on attack; like the Summon Monster II spell.Summoned Hellhound: CR 4; hide, breath of fire, fireball, melee; like the Summon Monster III spell.Fiendish Monstrous Spider: CR 6; web, ranged acid damage, tremor sense; like the Summon Monster IV spell.
